flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Berkshire Community College fell 26% between 2006 and 2009 (24.6% → 18.3%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Berkshire Community College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.5k → $6.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Berkshire Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Berkshire Community College rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2k → 1.4k).
